name: Seven Layer Salad
recipeInstructions:
Note: The name in the family recipe book is "Seven Layer Salad." Don't ask me why? It really isn't seven layers, but it has become my favorite. (BC)
Using a fairly deep baking dish (I use a 4-inch deep 9-inch X 9-inch Pyrex pan), place a bed of chopped lettuce on the bottom. Lay down a layer of celery, then onion, then green peppers, then peas, then eggs. The order is not important, and they will not form solid "layers." Repeat with another layer of lettuce and continue the procedure.
Mix mayonnaise and sugar together and spread evenly on top. Sprinkle bacon and cheddar cheese over the entire mixture.
Cover tightly and place in the refrigerator overnight, allowing the mayonnaise to permeate throughout.
